Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
Ah, another beautiful day at school.
The cherry blossoms are falling...

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: S-Senpai! Good morning! I was waiting for you!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Morning, Ibrahim. You're here early.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
W-well, I was hoping... um... 
maybe we could walk to class together?

Choices.Text: Sure, let's walk together, you dork. (Ibrahim Route)
Sorry, I'm waiting for Gustavo. (Gustavo Route)
No, I'd rather walk alone. (Jack Route)

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
Really?! Yay! I even made some of my special bento for lunch
if you want to share...

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: You're always taking care of me. What a cute nerd.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: Senpai, you always tease me! ...But I don't mind when it's you.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(Time passes. After school, I find Ibrahim struggling
to carry a massive stack of books.)

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: Woah! Ah! T-too heavy...

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Careful! Let me help you with those.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: T-thank you... You're always saving me. I'm so clumsy...

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: It's fine. I like helping you.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: Senpai... I... I can't hide it anymore.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Hide what?

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
I've been admiring you since the first day of school!
You're so kind, and brave... and perfect.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
I know I'm just a dorky nerd, but... I love you!
Please go out with me!

Choices.Text: I love you too, Ibrahim. (Kiss him)
I'm sorry, I only see you as a friend. (Reject him)

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(I pull him close by his football shirt and press my
lips against his. *Smooch*)

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: S-Senpai... did you just...? My heart is beating so fast...

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: I did. And I'll do it again if you keep looking at me like that.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
Please do! I mean... I'll do my best to be a boyfriend worthy of you!
I'll even tutor you in math every day!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Haha, I'd like that. Come here, you dork.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
Ibrahim... you're a great guy, but I just don't
feel that way about you.

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
O-oh... I understand. I'm sorry for making things
weird, Senpai...

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
It's not weird. I'll still be here if you need
help carrying your books, okay?

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text:
No... it's fine. I think I need to start carrying my
own weight. Thank you for everything, Senpai.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(He gives me a sad, brave smile before turning away.
I guess some things really do change.)

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: Oh... okay. I'll see you in class then, Senpai...

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text: Yo! Did I keep you waiting? Looking good today!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Not at all, Gustavo. You ready for practice?

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text: Always! Gotta keep these muscles in top shape. Let's hit the gym!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(I spend the afternoon watching Gustavo dominate the basketball
court. He winks at me every time he scores.)

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: (Later, we go to the local pub to chill.)

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text: Phew, great workout! Here, have a cold one. You earned it.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Thanks, Gustavo. You were amazing on the court today.

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
Yeah, well... (He suddenly looks nervous,
scratching the back of his neck)

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Is something wrong?

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
Look, I play it cool. I act like the confident jock. But the
truth is... I only play hard so you'll look at me.

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
I'm terrified of losing you to someone else. I don't want to
just be your workout buddy anymore. Be mine?

Choices.Text: I'm sorry, you're just a bro to me. (Reject him)

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(I lean over the table, put my hand on his shoulder, and kiss
him deeply. *Smooch*)

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text: Whoa... Best. Victory. Ever. Let's do a victory lap together!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Only if you can keep up with me.

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
Keep up? Babe, I'm the captain of the team. But... holding
your hand is the only trophy I need.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: That was incredibly cheesy, Gustavo.

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text: Yeah, but it made you smile, didn't it? Come on, let's go.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
Gustavo, I'm flattered, but I really just value our
friendship. I don't want to ruin that.

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
Ah... I see. Haha, my bad. Guess I shot an airball there.
Don't worry about it.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
Are we still okay? You're not going to avoid me
at the gym, right?

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
Avoid you? Bro... no way. I'm a captain.
I take my losses like a man.

Nodes.Speaker: Gustavo
Nodes.Text:
But... maybe give me a few days before our next workout.
Just... need to clear my head.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(He chugs the rest of his drink and walks out, leaving
me alone at the bar. It hurts more than I thought.)

Nodes.Speaker: Ibrahim
Nodes.Text: O-oh... I'm sorry to bother you. Have a good day.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(I walk through the hallway, minding my own business...
until I bump into someone.)

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text: Watch where you're going, idiot! Are you blind?!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: You bumped into me, Jack! Why are you always so mean?!

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
Tch! Whatever! Just... stay out of my way! ...And tie
your shoes, idiot!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(Time passes. It's the end of the day, and I'm walking home
on the street. I feel like I'm being followed.)

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text: Hey! Wait up, stupid!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Jack? Are you following me?

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
D-don't get the wrong idea! I just happened to be walking
this way. B-baka!

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
You live in the exact opposite direction. Why do you always act
like this?

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text: Ugh! Fine! Because I'm an idiot, okay?!

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
I'm mean to you because I don't know how else to get your
attention! Every time I see you, my chest hurts and I get angry!

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
I wanted to make sure you got home safe. I'm... I'm madly
in love with you, you idiot! Now what are you going to do about it?!

Choices.Text: You're an idiot... but I like you too. (Kiss him)
You're too toxic for me. (Reject him)

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(I grab his collar, pull him down, and kiss him hard.
*Smooch*)

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text: ...Y-you idiot... Do that again.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
What was that? I couldn't hear you over all that tough
guy attitude.

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
Shut up! I said... kiss me again! And... don't you dare
look at anyone else but me, understand?

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Only if you promise to walk me home every single day.

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
Tch. I was planning on doing that anyway. Idiots need
supervision, after all.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
Jack, you can't just bully someone and expect them to love
you back. Leave me alone.

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
I... I see. Yeah, I figured. Just... get home safe, okay?
I won't bother you again.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text: Jack, wait...

Nodes.Speaker: Jack
Nodes.Text:
Don't pity me! I don't need your pity! Just... forget
I ever said anything, you idiot.

Nodes.Speaker: Hero
Nodes.Text:
(He turns around and walks into the darkness.
For the first time, his voice didn't sound angry... it sounded broken.)
